_comment: B-288 clean: gateway IS remotely reachable (bind=lan) but every root-hooks session-key/agent-routing field is scoped, so RISK-20 must stay silent. hooks.token is deliberately omitted: B1 flags any truthy hooks.token without a SecretRef exemption, which would put an unrelated FAIL on a clean_* fixture. Do not add one. A real RUNNING config also carries hooks.token (hooks-Bjrm8pWp.js:332-334 throws 'hooks.enabled requires hooks.token'); it is omitted here ONLY because B1 flags any truthy hooks.token with no SecretRef exemption, unlike the product's own audit which skips env refs via looksLikeEnvRef (audit.nondeep.runtime-C3y1Q5Fi.js:623). That B1 gap is pre-existing and filed separately, not part of B-288.
